title: Woofi - Rekt
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by oracle manipulation on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates oracle prices immediately followed by a flash loan repayment.

red_flags: Immediate flash loan repayment after price manipulation
monitoring_rules: Monitor for any tx that manipulates oracle prices and then immediately repays a flash loan in the same transaction.
summary: WooFi suffered an $8.5 million loss due to a flash loan attack where the attacker manipulated the price of WOO using oracle manipulation to repay the flash loan at a cheaper price. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for oracle price manipulation followed by flash loan repayment.
